meta.name: Smoke test — 2 role ransomware
meta.description: Minimal CISO + SOC analyst exercise. Skips the AI setup dialogue (drops the default plan) and runs three player turns before ending. Useful for verifying the full session lifecycle without burning model tokens on setup.

scenario_prompt: Ransomware via vendor portal — finance laptops impacted at 03:14 Wed.

submissions.content: Isolate the affected laptops immediately via Defender. Pull IR Lead in. Start the regulator-notification clock.
Acknowledged — disabling the vendor account and pulling Defender event timeline now. Will report back in 5.
Stage Comms draft for legal review. Notify board chair via the secure channel.
Initial scope: 3 laptops in finance, all behind the vendor portal. No lateral movement seen yet.
Containment verified. Move to recovery planning. Document timeline for the AAR.
Recovery plan: re-image laptops from clean backups, rotate VPN creds, audit vendor-portal access logs for the past 90 days.
